title: mentha arvensis var. agrestis
intro: Mentha arvensis var. agrestis, also known as wild mint or field mint, is a subspecies of the mint plant that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Mentha arvensis var. agrestis include relief from digestive issues, sore throats, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to reduce stress and improve mental clarity. Herbal preparations of Mentha arvensis var. agrestis can be made into teas, infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which are often used in aromatherapy and as natural remedies for various health issues.
